title: extract_field: serde_json intermediates leak secret bytes unzeroized
description: secretx-core/src/lib.rs extract_field() calls serde_json::from_str() which allocates a serde_json::Map<String, serde_json::Value> on the heap. serde_json does not implement Zeroize. The extracted string value is copied into SecretValue (which is zeroized), but the Map and all other field values in the JSON object remain in unzeroized heap memory until the allocator reclaims them. Trigger: any call to extract_field() on a multi-field JSON secret → every field in the JSON, not just the requested one, is exposed in unzeroized heap memory.
